message:
fix(abi): add missing unsafe block around vfork FFI call and simplify join byte slice

Wrap super::process_abi::vfork() call in __vfork shim with explicit
unsafe block for Rust 2024 edition compliance. Simplify putgrent
member-list join from &[b','] slice cast to b"," literal.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
